specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services, and we've built a reputation as a dependable boatworks for boat owners who take their vessels seriously. Whether you're docked in the Chesapeake Bay area or running offshore, we're here to make sure your boat is ready when you are.

At Ben's Boatworks, we handle the work that keeps boats safe, comfortable, and compliant. Our boat surveying and inspection services give buyers and owners a clear picture of a vessel's true condition — no surprises. Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, prop work, and anything else that requires getting below the waterline. We also specialize in marine AC and climate control systems, because comfort on the water matters, especially during long passages or hot summer months. Rounding out our offerings, our marine plumbing and sanitation work keeps your onboard systems functioning cleanly and reliably.

We serve boat owners throughout South Florida and the surrounding region, within roughly 60 miles of our base. Our clients range from first-time buyers looking for a pre-purchase survey to seasoned captains who just need their systems dialed in before a big trip. Whatever brings you to us, you can count on Ben's Boatworks to treat your boat like it matters — because we know it does. Your vessel represents a significant investment, and we take that seriously every time we step aboard.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing in South Florida. Call us today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts thorough boat surveys and inspections to assess a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or condition-and-value report, we provide detailed documentation so you can make informed decisions about your boat.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and other below-the-waterline work that keeps your vessel performing safely. We handle underwater tasks efficiently so you spend less time out of the water and more time running.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your vessel comfortable in any conditions. From routine maintenance and refrigerant checks to full system replacements, we work on chilled water and direct expansion systems across a wide range of vessel types.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We service and repair marine plumbing systems including freshwater, raw water, and holding tank setups, along with marine sanitation devices and through-hull fittings. Properly functioning onboard plumbing and sanitation systems are essential for safety, compliance, and comfort during any voyage.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Hull cleaning and underwater zinc replacement via dive service
Marine AC system repair and refrigerant recharge aboard vessel
Holding tank replacement and marine sanitation system overhaul
Propeller inspection and line removal by certified dive technician
Freshwater and raw water plumbing leak diagnosis and repair
Insurance or damage survey following collision or grounding incident
